title: apb.config.load request

config.description: Structured config configuration. Only the declared properties are accepted.

clock.description: Action-specific clock input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

rst_n.description: Action-specific rst_n input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

edge.description: Clock sampling edge. The schema default is authoritative; negedge often matches monitor semantics.

sample_point.description: Before/after observation point for posedge or dual sampling; it does not change the raw waveform range.

paddr.description: Action-specific paddr input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

psel.description: Action-specific psel input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

penable.description: Action-specific penable input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

pready.description: Action-specific pready input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

pslverr.description: Action-specific pslverr input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

pwrite.description: Action-specific pwrite input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

pwdata.description: Action-specific pwdata input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

prdata.description: Action-specific prdata input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

config_path.description: Action-specific config_path input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

name.description: Saved-object name in this action namespace; do not assume names are shared by cursors, lists, and protocol configs.

time_unit.description: Interprets only unitless time numbers; it never overrides a time string that already has a unit.

description: Load and validate an APB interface configuration.
x-how_it_works: 保存 APB interface 信号映射。
x-when_to_use: 定义后续 APB 查询对象。
x-arg_contract_notes: required: name; also one of: config / config_path

do_not_use_when: 不要把本 action 用于 apb.config.list、apb.cursor 的业务目标；请改用列出的同域 action。

alternatives.when: 在 APB transfer 间移动游标。

constraints: required: name; also one of: config / config_path
